User added:
"For you know that your lives were ransomed once and for all from the empty and futile way of life handed down from generation to generation. It was not a ransom payment of silver and gold, which eventually perishes, but the precious blood of Christ--who like a spotless, unblemished lamb was sacrificed for us."
‭‭1 Peter‬ ‭1:18-19‬ ‭TPT‬‬‬‬‬‬

We all struggle with competing demands from life; work, family, relationships, etc. Partly, the reason for so many rules for the Hebrews was to help them incorporate God into their everyday lives, but the rules became god for many of them. God has always wanted to be the centerpiece of our lives. Thankfully, He sent Jesus, so we can always have His Spirit with us. Take time throughout your day to focus on God. The more you seek Him, the more you will see Him in all you do!

-Sean Lennon
Interview Text:
Debra:

(part 3)

The church tends to skip Saturday. We go from the Crucifixion to the Resurrection without stopping to consider the implications of the tomb. That is where so many things that Jesus took on and defeated for us were laid to rest. Jesus really fully died. And that is important because he put all of those fears and heart wounds finally to rest. They all died with his body. And only then did he resurrect. Only then did Debra resurrect as a new creation in Christ, no longer fearful and wounded, but confident, joyful, full of life and love. 

She said one time in a vision she saw all of her fears gathered up into one place in her, and they were put in a bowl. And then she saw the bowl poured out on the ground at the foot of the cross. And all those fears soaked into the ground and then caused flowers to bloom. This was how she said that Jesus showed her what he would do with all her fears. He brings beauty out of ashes and turns mourning into dancing. 

Another time she was having a hard day and some of her resources were really being stretched and she didn't know how she was going to handle those situations. But in one second she saw God, in white robes, come all the way down from heaven and meet her. In this vision, she was a little child. She said from this she realized that she didn't have to figure out some way to provide for herself, that God is her Father and will always take care of her.
Music Video Instructions: Imagine God saying he loves your praise, but asking you to live it out with your actions.
